sizing_rule.note: Portfolio weighting optimization via quadratic programming: solve for weightings (X1, X2, X3, ..., Xn) that minimize portfolio variance subject to target expected return constraint and sum-to-one constraint, using covariance matrix. Mathematically equivalent to mean-variance optimization (Markowitz). Author does not specify optimal_f fraction, kelly fraction, or drawdown tolerance thresholds.

source_rule_text: Determine optimal position weightings (X1, X2, X3) across multiple instruments by solving a system of equations that minimizes variance (V) subject to a chosen expected return level (E).
